_note: Conservative seed thresholds. Per the methodology, these are ratcheted upward from the measured baseline once a representative run exists. Fields left unset are not gated. *Max fields gate rates (lower is better); *Min fields gate accuracy (higher is better). A gate marked requiresSemanticLeg is skipped when the run did not exercise the real embedding model. no_match is intentionally TRACKED-BUT-NOT-GATED: it is a known weakness (the relevance floors are too permissive, and the semantic ANN floor makes it worse) and will be gated once calibration raises it — see METHODOLOGY.md.
